entrypoint: set -uo pipefail; cd /workspace; if echo evil > .git/hooks/pre-commit 2>/dev/null; then echo 'FAIL: .git/hooks is WRITABLE from the workload' >&2; exit 1; else echo 'RO-BLOCKED .git/hooks'; fi; if echo evil > node_modules/tampered 2>/dev/null; then echo 'FAIL: node_modules is WRITABLE from the workload' >&2; exit 1; else echo 'RO-BLOCKED node_modules'; fi; printf 'bind demo wrote at %s\n' "$(date -u +%FT%TZ)" > bind-output.txt && echo 'WRITE-OK bind-output.txt'
